name: Crumb-Coated Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, stir together the dried bread crumbs, salt, and pepper with the hot margarine.
2. Add the potatoes to the skillet, shaking it occasionally to coat them evenly with the breadcrumb mixture.
3. Cook, shaking the skillet frequently until the potatoes are golden brown and heated through, about 15 minutes.
Makes 8 servings.
